Party Rentals in Bathurst NB

Bathurst is a bilingual city on Chaleur Bay in northern New Brunswick, where Acadian and English heritages blend. Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. Bathurst NB is a bilingual city at the head of Chaleur Bay on New Brunswick's north coast, approximately 375 km from Bridgewater. We consider selected larger events in New Brunswick by availability and quote. Contact us with your event details and we will let you know whether your date and location work for our schedule.

Bathurst NB is approximately 375 km from our Bridgewater base. New Brunswick bookings are for selected larger events only. Travel costs, accommodation requirements if applicable, availability, and all logistics are confirmed by quote before any commitment.

Featured Rentals

  • Crown Island Combo - Combo Inflatable, By quote, Wet-use - Tropical combo with bounce, slide, and splash/pool fun.
  • Kids Foam Party - Foam Party, From $200/hr add-on · From $349/hr standalone, Wet-use - High-energy foam fun for kids' birthdays, school fun days, daycares, summer camps, church events, and family celebrations.
  • 360 Photo Booth - Photo Booth, From $249, Dry-use - 360 Photo Booth rental for weddings, graduations, birthdays, school events, community events, corporate events, church events, and fundraisers in Nova Scotia.

Best For

  • Birthday parties
  • School events
  • Community celebrations
  • Summer outdoor events

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you offer party rentals in Bathurst NB?
Bathurst NB is approximately 375 km from Bridgewater. We accept selected larger NB party rental events by availability and quote.
What party rental packages do you offer?
Our party packages start from $370 and bundle inflatables, lawn games, and extras for great value. Examples include the Island Splash package ($370) which combines the Crown Island Combo with a foam party add-on, and multi-item combos that add lawn games and a 360 Video Booth. Full package details are at novakingdomrentals.com/packages.
What is included in a party rental package?
Packages vary but typically include one or more inflatables, optional foam party add-on, optional lawn games, and optional 360 Video Booth. All packages include setup and takedown. Travel is quoted separately based on your event address.
What deposit is required for a party rental?
A deposit is required to hold your event date. The deposit amount and payment method are confirmed when we send your booking confirmation. Bookings are not confirmed until the deposit is received.
What party rental options work best for Bathurst NB events?
For Bathurst NB events we most often recommend starting with an inflatable that suits your crowd size, then adding lawn games, a foam party, or a 360 Video Booth depending on your guest mix. Our packages from $370 are designed to bundle the most popular combinations at a saving.
